Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetOpFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.OneTypes.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispInvertibles.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.CleavingOfBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.Codomain.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Examples.OneTypesLimits.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
The codomain displayed bicategory has a cleaving
Here we assume that every 2-cell is invertible
 *)
Section CodomainCleaving.
  Context (B : bicat).

  
B: bicat
local_iso_cleaving (cod_disp_bicat B)

  
B: bicat
local_iso_cleaving (cod_disp_bicat B)

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
∑ ff : hx -->[ f] hy, disp_invertible_2cell α ff hf

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
hx -->[ f] hy
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
(λ ff : hx -->[ f] hy, disp_invertible_2cell α ff hf)
  ?pr1

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
hx -->[ f] hy
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (pr1 hf · pr2 hy)

      exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                  _
                  α)
               (pr2 hf)).
    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
(λ ff : hx -->[ f] hy, disp_invertible_2cell α ff hf)
  (pr1 hf,,
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr2 hx) α)
      (pr2 hf)
    :
    pr2 hx -->[ f,, pr1 hf] pr2 hy))
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
((pr2 hx ◃ α) • pr2 hf) • (id₂ (pr1 hf) ▹ pr2 hy) =
(pr2 hx ◃ α) • pr12 hf
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_disp_invertible_2cell α (id₂ (pr1 hf),, ?Goal)

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
((pr2 hx ◃ α) • pr2 hf) • (id₂ (pr1 hf) ▹ pr2 hy) =
(pr2 hx ◃ α) • pr12 hf
 abstract
          (rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_right ;
           apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_disp_invertible_2cell α
  (id₂ (pr1 hf),,
   cod_local_iso_cleaving_subproof x y f g hx hy hf α)
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1
     (id₂ (pr1 hf),,
      cod_local_iso_cleaving_subproof x y f g hx hy hf
        α))

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
α: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell (id₂ (pr1 hf))

        is_iso.
  Defined.

  Section CartesianOfSFibToCartesian.
    Context {c₁ c₂ : B}
            {s₁ s₂ : c₁ --> c₂}
            {α : s₁ ==> s₂}
            {t₁ : cod_disp_bicat B c₁}
            {t₂ : cod_disp_bicat B c₂}
            {ss₁ : t₁ -->[ s₁ ] t₂}
            {ss₂ : t₁ -->[ s₂ ] t₂}
            (αα : ss₁ ==>[ α ] ss₂)
            (Hαα : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)).

    Section FixSome.
      Context {h : c₁ --> c₂}
              {hh : t₁ -->[ h] t₂}
              {γ : h ==> s₁}
              (γα : hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂).

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
isaprop (∑ γγ : hh ==>[ γ] ss₁, γγ •• αα = γα)

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
isaprop (∑ γγ : hh ==>[ γ] ss₁, γγ •• αα = γα)

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
∏
x
 x' : ∑
      γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
           pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
           (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
      (pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα,
iscontr (x = x')

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑
   γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
        pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
        (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
   (pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα)

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
φ₁ = φ₂

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧

(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂

     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα

c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂

B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr11 φ₂ ▹ pr2 t₂ = ?δp
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr11 φ₁ • pr1 αα = ?α

c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr11 φ₂ • pr1 αα = ?α

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂
 exact (pr1 γα).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr1 hh · pr2 t₂ ==> pr1 ss₁ · pr2 t₂
 exact ((pr2 hh)^-1 • (_ ◃ γ) • pr2 ss₁).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr1 γα ▹ pr2 t₂ =
(((pr2 hh) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 ss₁)
• (pr1 αα ▹ pr2 t₂)
 abstract
            (rewrite !vassocl ;
             use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
             refine (pr2 γα @ _) ;
             rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             exact (!(pr2 αα))).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)

αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr11 φ₁ ▹ pr2 t₂ =
((pr2 hh) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 ss₁
 abstract
            (rewrite !vassocl ;
             use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
             exact (pr21 φ₁)).

 abstract

B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr11 φ₁ • pr1 αα = pr1 γα
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁)).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
     pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁,
(pr1 γγ • pr1 αα),, pr2 γγ •• pr2 αα = γα
pr11 φ₂ • pr1 αα = pr1 γα
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₂)).
      Qed.

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
hh ==>[ γ] ss₁

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
hh ==>[ γ] ss₁

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) = (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 ss₁

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)

hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
coherent_homot γ ?h

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₁
 
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
pr1 hh · pr2 t₂ ==> pr1 ss₁ · pr2 t₂

c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
pr1 γα ▹ pr2 t₂ = ?δp • (pr1 αα ▹ pr2 t₂)

          
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
pr1 hh · pr2 t₂ ==> pr1 ss₁ · pr2 t₂
 exact ((pr2 hh)^-1 • (_ ◃ γ) • pr2 ss₁).
          
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
pr1 γα ▹ pr2 t₂ =
(((pr2 hh) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 ss₁)
• (pr1 αα ▹ pr2 t₂)
 abstract
              (rewrite !vassocl ;
               use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
               refine (pr2 γα @ _) ;
               rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
               rewrite !vassocl ;
               apply maponpaths ;
               exact (!(pr2 αα))).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 hh • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂
coherent_homot γ
  (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor (pr2 t₂) Hαα
     (pr1 γα)
     (((pr2 hh) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 ss₁)
     (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell_subproof
        t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ αα hh γα))
 abstract
            (unfold coherent_homot ;
             rewrite is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor_over ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell
•• αα = γα

is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell

B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
(is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor (pr2 t₂) Hαα (pr1 γα)
   (((pr2 hh) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 ss₁)
   (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell_subproof
      t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ αα hh γα) • pr1 αα),,
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell_subproof0
  t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ αα Hαα hh γα •• pr2 αα = γα

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
   pr12 hh • (x ▹ pr2 t₂) =
   (pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂)
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
pr1
  ((is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor (pr2 t₂) Hαα
      (pr1 γα)
      (((pr2 hh) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 ss₁)
      (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell_subproof
         t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ αα hh γα) • pr1 αα),,
   is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell_subproof0
     t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ αα Hαα hh γα •• pr2 αα) = pr1 γα

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂,
   pr12 hh • (x ▹ pr2 t₂) =
   (pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂)

          
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
x: pr1 hh ==> pr1 ss₂
isaprop
  (pr12 hh • (x ▹ pr2 t₂) =
   (pr2 t₁ ◃ (γ • α)) • pr12 ss₂)

          apply cellset_property.
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: h ==> s₁
γα: hh ==>[ γ • α] ss₂
pr1
  ((is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor (pr2 t₂) Hαα
      (pr1 γα)
      (((pr2 hh) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 ss₁)
      (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell_subproof
         t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ αα hh γα) • pr1 αα),,
   is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_cell_subproof0
     t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ αα Hαα hh γα •• pr2 αα) = pr1 γα

        apply is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor_comm.
      Qed.
    End FixSome.

 exact (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_to_is_cartesian_2cell_comm γα).
    Defined.
  End CartesianOfSFibToCartesian.

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
is_cartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
is_cartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα

t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂

ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂

is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)

    exact Hαα.
  Defined.

  Section OpCartesianOfSOpFibToOpCartesian.
    Context {c₁ c₂ : B}
            {s₁ s₂ : c₁ --> c₂}
            {α : s₁ ==> s₂}
            {t₁ : cod_disp_bicat B c₁}
            {t₂ : cod_disp_bicat B c₂}
            {ss₁ : t₁ -->[ s₁ ] t₂}
            {ss₂ : t₁ -->[ s₂ ] t₂}
            (αα : ss₁ ==>[ α ] ss₂)
            (Hαα : is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)).

    Section FixSome.
      Context {h : c₁ --> c₂}
              {hh : t₁ -->[ h ] t₂}
              {γ : s₂ ==> h}
              (γα : ss₁ ==>[ α • γ ] hh).

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
isaprop (∑ γγ : ss₂ ==>[ γ] hh, αα •• γγ = γα)

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
isaprop (∑ γγ : ss₂ ==>[ γ] hh, αα •• γγ = γα)

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
∏
x
 x' : ∑
      γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
           pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
           (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
      (pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα,
iscontr (x = x')

pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂

h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)

γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑
   γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
        pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
        (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
   (pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα)

c₁, c₂: B

α: s₁ ==> s₂

h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

     pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =

(pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα

γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
     pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
(pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα
pr1 αα • pr11 φ₂ = ?α

        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
     pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
(pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα
pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh
 exact (pr1 γα).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
     pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
(pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα
pr1 ss₂ · pr2 t₂ ==> pr1 hh · pr2 t₂
 exact ((pr2 ss₂)^-1 • (_ ◃ γ) • pr2 hh).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
     pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
(pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα
pr1 γα ▹ pr2 t₂ =
(pr1 αα ▹ pr2 t₂)
• (((pr2 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 hh)
 abstract
              (use (vcomp_lcancel (pr12 ss₁)) ; [ apply (pr2 ss₁) | ] ;
               rewrite !vassocr ;
               rewrite !(pr2 γα) ;
               apply maponpaths_2 ;
               rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
               apply maponpaths_2 ;
               rewrite (pr2 αα) ;
               rewrite !vassocl ;
               rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
               rewrite id2_right ;
               apply idpath).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
     pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
(pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα
pr11 φ₁ ▹ pr2 t₂ =
((pr2 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 hh
 abstract
            (rewrite !vassocl ;
             use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
             exact (pr21 φ₁)).

c₁, c₂: B

pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =

φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
     pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
(pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα
pr11 φ₂ ▹ pr2 t₂ =
((pr2 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 hh
 abstract
            (rewrite !vassocl ;
             use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
             exact (pr21 φ₂)).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
     pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
(pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα
pr1 αα • pr11 φ₁ = pr1 γα
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁)).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
γγ : ∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
     pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
     (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh,
(pr1 αα • pr1 γγ),, pr2 αα •• pr2 γγ = γα
pr1 αα • pr11 φ₂ = pr1 γα
 exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₂)).
      Qed.

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
ss₂ ==>[ γ] hh

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: t₁ -->[ h] t₂
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
ss₂ ==>[ γ] hh

γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
∑ xx : pr1 ss₂ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₂ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) = (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ) • pr12 hh

B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧

γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
coherent_homot γ ?h

B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧

pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =

h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
pr1 γα ▹ pr2 t₂ = (pr1 αα ▹ pr2 t₂) • ?δp

          
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B

α: s₁ ==> s₂

ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
pr1 ss₂ · pr2 t₂ ==> pr1 hh · pr2 t₂
 exact ((pr2 ss₂)^-1 • (_ ◃ γ) • pr2 hh).
          
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
pr1 γα ▹ pr2 t₂ =
(pr1 αα ▹ pr2 t₂)
• (((pr2 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 hh)
 abstract
              (use (vcomp_lcancel (pr12 ss₁)) ; [ apply (pr2 ss₁) | ] ;
               rewrite !vassocr ;
               rewrite !(pr2 γα) ;
               apply maponpaths_2 ;
               rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
               apply maponpaths_2 ;
               rewrite (pr2 αα) ;
               rewrite !vassocl ;
               rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
               rewrite id2_right ;
               apply idpath).
        
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
t₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ss₁: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₁) (fD · pr2 t₂)
ss₂: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧, invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · s₂) (fD · pr2 t₂)
αα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 ss₂,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ α) • pr12 ss₂
Hαα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib (pr2 t₂) (pr1 αα)
h: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
hh: ∑ fD : B ⟦ pr1 t₁, pr1 t₂ ⟧,
invertible_2cell (pr2 t₁ · h) (fD · pr2 t₂)
γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ∑ xx : pr1 ss₁ ==> pr1 hh,
pr12 ss₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 t₂) =
(pr2 t₁ ◃ (α • γ)) • pr12 hh
coherent_homot γ
  (is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor (pr2 t₂) Hαα
     (pr1 γα)
     (((pr2 ss₂) ^-1 • (pr2 t₁ ◃ γ)) • pr2 hh)
     (is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_to_is_opcartesian_2cell_cell_subproof
        t₁ t₂ ss₁ ss₂ αα hh γα))
 abstract
            (unfold coherent_homot ;
             rewrite is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_factor_over ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂

γ: s₂ ==> h
γα: ss₁ ==>[ α • γ] hh
(λ γγ : ss₂ ==>[ γ] hh, αα •• γγ = γα)
  (is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_to_is_opcartesian_2cell_cell
     γα)
 exact (is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib_to_is_opcartesian_2cell_comm γα).
    Defined.
  End OpCartesianOfSOpFibToOpCartesian.

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)

c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂

B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂

ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂

B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
s₁, s₂: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
α: s₁ ==> s₂
t₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
t₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ss₁: t₁ -->[ s₁] t₂
ss₂: t₁ -->[ s₂] t₂
αα: ss₁ ==>[ α] ss₂
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)

    exact Hαα.
  Defined.

  (** Characterization of cartesian 1-cells *)
  Section PullbackToCartesian.
    Context {x y : B}
            {f : x --> y}
            {hx : cod_disp_bicat B x}
            {hy : cod_disp_bicat B y}
            (π : pr1 hx --> pr1 hy)
            (p : invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy))
            (pb := make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
            (pb_sqr : has_pb_ump pb).

    Section Lift1CellConeMor.
      Context {z : B}
              {hz : cod_disp_bicat B z}
              {g : z --> x}
              (hg : hz -->[ g · f] hy).

      Let other_cone : pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
        := make_pb_cone
             (pr1 hz)
             (pr2 hz · g)
             (pr1 hg)
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                (pr2 hg)).

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) hg
pb_1cell other_cone pb

?φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb =
(((lassociator ?φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (?τ ▹ f))
  • pb_cone_cell other_cone) • 
 (?θ ^-1 ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ?φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) hg
is_invertible_2cell (pr112 Hg)
 exact (pr21 (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell _ (pr2 Hg))).
        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) hg
pr11 Hg ◃ pb_cone_cell pb =
(((lassociator (pr11 Hg) (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
   • (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pr21 Hg) ▹ f))
  • pb_cone_cell other_cone)
 • ((make_invertible_2cell
       (pr21 (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
                (pr2 Hg)))) ^-1 ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator (pr11 Hg) (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)
 abstract
            (pose (pr212 Hg) as q ;
             cbn ; cbn in q ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2 in q ;
             rewrite id2_left in q ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             do 3 (use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn) ;
             refine (_ @ maponpaths (λ z, z • _) q) ; clear q ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             do 3 apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • (_ • z)) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             pose (maponpaths pr1 (disp_vcomp_rinv (pr2 Hg))) as q0 ;
             assert (q : pr1 (pr2 Hg •• disp_inv_cell (pr2 Hg)) = id₂ (pr11 Hg · π)) ;
             [
              etrans; [exact q0 |] ;
              unfold transportb ;
              cbn ;
              etrans ;
              [ refine (pr1_transportf (! id2_left (id₂ (g · f))) (id₂ (pr11 Hg · π),,
                                                                      disp_id2 _)) |] ;
              cbn ;
              rewrite transportf_const ;
              apply idpath
             |
              refine (!_) ;
              etrans ;
              [ do 2 apply maponpaths ;
                apply maponpaths_2 ;
                apply maponpaths ;
                exact q
              | ] ;
              rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_left ;
              rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
              apply id2_right ]
            ).
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) hg

        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

pr1 hz -->[ g] pr1 hx
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
(λ fD : pr1 hz -->[ g] pr1 hx,
 pr2 hz -->[ g,, fD] pr2 hx) 
  ?pr1
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb

hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy

  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
pr1 ((?pr1,, ?pr2) ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
id2_invertible_2cell (g · f)] 
pr1 hg
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
(λ xx : pr1 ((?pr1,, ?pr2) ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
        id2_invertible_2cell (g · f)] 
        pr1 hg,
 let PPP :=
   (g · f,, pr1 ((?pr1,, ?pr2) ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp) ==>
   (g · f,, pr1 hg) in
 pr2 ((?pr1,, ?pr2) ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
 id2_invertible_2cell (g · f),, xx : PPP] 
 pr2 hg) ?pr10
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
(λ x0 : (?pr1,, ?pr2) ;; 
        (π,, p) ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell (g · f)] hg,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (id2_invertible_2cell (g · f)) x0) 
  (?pr10,, ?pr20)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
pr1 hz -->[ g] pr1 hx
 exact (pb_1cell_1cell Hg).
        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
(λ fD : pr1 hz -->[ g] pr1 hx,
 pr2 hz -->[ g,, fD] pr2 hx) Hg
 exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr1 Hg)).
        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
pr1
  ((Hg,, inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr1 Hg)) ;; 
   (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
id2_invertible_2cell (g · f)] pr1 hg
 exact (pr1 (pb_1cell_pr2 Hg)).
        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
(λ xx : pr1
          ((Hg,,
            inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr1 Hg)) ;; 
           (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
        id2_invertible_2cell (g · f)] pr1 hg,
 let PPP :=
   (g · f,,
    pr1
      ((Hg,, inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr1 Hg)) ;; 
       (π,, p))%mor_disp) ==> (g · f,, pr1 hg) in
 pr2
   ((Hg,, inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr1 Hg)) ;; 
    (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
 id2_invertible_2cell (g · f),, xx : PPP] pr2 hg)
  (pr1 (pb_1cell_pr2 Hg))
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             pose (pb_1cell_eq Hg) as q ;
             cbn in q ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             do 3 (use vcomp_move_R_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn) ;
             refine (maponpaths (λ z, z • _) q @ _) ; clear q ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             do 3 apply maponpaths ;
             refine (_ @ id2_right _) ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             use vcomp_move_R_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left, id2_right ;
             apply idpath).
        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
(λ x0 : (Hg,,
         inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr1 Hg)) ;; 
        (π,, p) ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell (g · f)] hg,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (id2_invertible_2cell (g · f)) x0)
  (pr1 (pb_1cell_pr2 Hg),,
   pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell_subproof Hg)
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
other_cone:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g)
  (pr1 hg)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 hz) g f) (pr2 hg)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
Hg: pb_1cell other_cone pb
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1
     (pr1 (pb_1cell_pr2 Hg),,
      pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell_subproof Hg))

          exact (pr2 (pb_1cell_pr2 Hg)).
      Defined.
    End Lift1CellConeMor.

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) hg

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) hg

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
z: B
hz: cod_disp_bicat B z
g: B ⟦ z, x ⟧
hg: hz -->[ g · f] hy
pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hz) (pr2 hz · g) (pr1 hg)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell (pr2 hz) g f)
        (pr2 hg))) pb

      apply (has_pb_ump_1 pb_sqr).
    Defined.

    Section Lift2CellConeCell.
      Context {c : B}
              {cc : cod_disp_bicat B c}
              {h h' : c --> x}
              {gg : cc -->[ h · f] hy}
              {gg' : cc -->[ h' · f] hy}
              {δ : h ==> h'}
              (σσ : gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg')
              (Lh : lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg)
              (Lh' : lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg').

      Let ℓ : pr1 cc --> pr1 hx := pr11 Lh.
      Let ℓhx : invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx) := pr21 Lh.
      Let ℓπ
        : invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
        := pr1 (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell _ (pr2 Lh)).
      Let ℓ' : pr1 cc --> pr1 hx := pr11 Lh'.
      Let ℓhx' : invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx) := pr21 Lh'.
      Let ℓπ'
        : invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
        := pr1 (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell _ (pr2 Lh')).

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
(((ℓ ◃ p) • lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy))
 • (((pr112 Lh • pr1 σσ)
     • pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh'))) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f
  • (((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') ▹ f))
 • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f) • (ℓ' ◃ p)

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
(((ℓ ◃ p) • lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy))
 • (((pr112 Lh • pr1 σσ)
     • pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh'))) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f
  • (((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') ▹ f))
 • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f) • (ℓ' ◃ p)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d:= pr212 Lh: (λ xx : pr1 (pr1 Lh ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
        id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)] 
        pr1 gg,
 let PPP :=
   (h · f,, pr1 (pr1 Lh ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp) ==>
   (h · f,, pr1 gg) in
 pr2 (pr1 Lh ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
 id2_invertible_2cell (h · f),, xx : PPP] 
 pr2 gg) (pr112 Lh)
(((ℓ ◃ p) • lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy))
 • (((pr112 Lh • pr1 σσ)
     • pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh'))) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f
  • (((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') ▹ f))
 • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f) • (ℓ' ◃ p)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d:= pr212 Lh: (λ xx : pr1 (pr1 Lh ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
        id2_invertible_2cell (h · f)] 
        pr1 gg,
 let PPP :=
   (h · f,, pr1 (pr1 Lh ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp) ==>
   (h · f,, pr1 gg) in
 pr2 (pr1 Lh ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
 id2_invertible_2cell (h · f),, xx : PPP] 
 pr2 gg) (pr112 Lh)
d':= pr212 Lh': (λ xx : pr1 (pr1 Lh' ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
        id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f)] 
        pr1 gg',
 let PPP :=
   (h' · f,, pr1 (pr1 Lh' ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp) ==>
   (h' · f,, pr1 gg') in
 pr2 (pr1 Lh' ;; (π,, p))%mor_disp ==>[
 id2_invertible_2cell (h' · f),, xx : PPP] 
 pr2 gg') (pr112 Lh')
(((ℓ ◃ p) • lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy))
 • (((pr112 Lh • pr1 σσ)
     • pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh'))) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f
  • (((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') ▹ f))
 • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f) • (ℓ' ◃ p)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d:= pr212 Lh: ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h f • (pr121 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ pr2 hy) =
(pr2 cc ◃ id₂ (h · f)) • pr12 gg
d':= pr212 Lh': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) =
(pr2 cc ◃ id₂ (h' · f)) • pr12 gg'
(((ℓ ◃ p) • lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy))
 • (((pr112 Lh • pr1 σσ)
     • pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh'))) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f
  • (((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') ▹ f))
 • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f) • (ℓ' ◃ p)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h f • (pr121 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg
d':= pr212 Lh': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) =
(pr2 cc ◃ id₂ (h' · f)) • pr12 gg'
(((ℓ ◃ p) • lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy))
 • (((pr112 Lh • pr1 σσ)
     • pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh'))) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f
  • (((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') ▹ f))
 • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f) • (ℓ' ◃ p)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'

Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'

ℓπ:= pr1

     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)

ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h f • (pr121 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg
d': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg'
(((ℓ ◃ p) • lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy))
 • (((pr112 Lh • pr1 σσ)
     • pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh'))) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f
  • (((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') ▹ f))
 • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f) • (ℓ' ◃ p)

gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy

σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'

  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')

   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy))

d': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg'
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv ℓhx)) ^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f) ^-1
   • ((ℓ ◃ p)
      • (lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy)

                  • rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy))))))) =
((pr2 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f)

ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h f • (pr121 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg
d': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg'
(((((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h f • (ℓhx ▹ f))
      • rassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f) • (ℓ ◃ p))
    • lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy)) • (pr112 Lh ▹ pr2 hy))
  • (pr1 σσ ▹ pr2 hy))
 • (pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh')) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy) = ?b
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d: ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h f • (pr121 Lh ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg
d': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg'
?b =
(((lassociator (pr2 cc) h f • ((pr2 cc ◃ δ) ▹ f))
  • (ℓhx' ▹ f)) • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f)
• (ℓ' ◃ p)

B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
