π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg'
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh')) ▹ pr2 hy)

          
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg'
is_invertible_2cell (pr1 (disp_inv_cell (pr2 Lh')))

          apply (is_invertible_2cell_inv (pr2 ℓπ')).
        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg'
pr12 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ pr2 hy) =
((((((pr2 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f)
    • (ℓhx' ▹ f)) • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f)
  • (ℓ' ◃ p)) • lassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy))
• (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (pr2 hy)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv (pr2 ℓπ'))) ^-1

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg'
pr12 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ pr2 hy) =
((((((pr2 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f)
    • (ℓhx' ▹ f)) • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f)
  • (ℓ' ◃ p)) • lassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': ((((lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
   • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
  • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
 • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))
• (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy) = pr12 gg'
pr12 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ pr2 hy) =
(pr2 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f))
• (lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
   • ((ℓhx' ▹ f)
      • (rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f
         • ((ℓ' ◃ p)
            • (lassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy)
               • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))))

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
• ((pr121 Lh' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f
      • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p)
         • (lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))) = pr12 gg'
pr12 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ pr2 hy) =
(pr2 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f))
• (lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
   • ((ℓhx' ▹ f)
      • (rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f
         • ((ℓ' ◃ p)
            • (lassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy)
               • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))))

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
• ((pr121 Lh' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f
      • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p)
         • (lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))) = pr12 gg'
(pr2 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f))
• (lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
   • ((ℓhx' ▹ f)
      • (rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f
         • ((ℓ' ◃ p)
            • (lassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy)
               • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy)))))) =
pr12 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ pr2 hy)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
• ((pr121 Lh' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f
      • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p)
         • (lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))) = pr12 gg'
(pr2 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f))
• (lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
   • ((ℓhx' ▹ f)
      • (rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f
         • ((ℓ' ◃ p)
            • (lassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy)
               • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy)))))) = ?b
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
• ((pr121 Lh' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f
      • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p)
         • (lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))) = pr12 gg'
?b = pr12 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ pr2 hy)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
• ((pr121 Lh' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f
      • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p)
         • (lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))) = pr12 gg'
(pr2 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f))
• (lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
   • ((ℓhx' ▹ f)
      • (rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f
         • ((ℓ' ◃ p)
            • (lassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy)
               • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy)))))) = ?b

          
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
• ((pr121 Lh' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f
      • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p)
         • (lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))) = pr12 gg'
lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
• ((ℓhx' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f
      • ((ℓ' ◃ p)
         • (lassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy)
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))) = ?t2

          exact d'.
        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
• ((pr121 Lh' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f
      • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p)
         • (lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))) = pr12 gg'
(pr2 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr12 gg' =
pr12 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ pr2 hy)

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
d': lassociator (pr2 cc) h' f
• ((pr121 Lh' ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f
      • ((pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p)
         • (lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)
            • (pr112 Lh' ▹ pr2 hy))))) = pr12 gg'
pr12 gg • (pr1 σσ ▹ pr2 hy) =
(pr2 cc ◃ (δ ▹ f)) • pr12 gg'

        exact (pr2 σσ).
      Qed.

B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
(((ℓ ◃ p) • lassociator ℓ π (pr2 hy))
 • ((((pr112 Lh,,
       make_is_invertible_2cell
         (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell_subproof
            B c y (h · f) cc hy
            (pr11 Lh · π,,
             ((((lassociator ... h f • (...))
                • rassociator (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f)
               • (pr11 Lh ◃ pr1 p))
              • lassociator (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy)),,
             is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                           ... h f)
                        (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                           f ...))
                     (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                        (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                     (pr11 Lh) (pr2 p)))
               (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                  (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy))) gg (pr2 Lh))
         (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell_subproof0
            B c y (h · f) cc hy
            (pr11 Lh · π,,
             ((((lassociator ... h f • (...))
                • rassociator (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f)
               • (pr11 Lh ◃ pr1 p))
              • lassociator (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy)),,
             is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                           ... h f)
                        (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                           f ...))
                     (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                        (pr11 Lh) (pr2 hx) f))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                     (pr11 Lh) (pr2 p)))
               (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                  (pr11 Lh) π (pr2 hy))) gg (pr2 Lh)))
      • pr1 σσ)
     • (pr112 Lh',,
        make_is_invertible_2cell
          (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell_subproof
             B c y (h' · f) cc hy
             (pr11 Lh' · π,,
              ((((lassociator (...) h' f
                  • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
                 • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
                • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
               • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)),,
              is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                         (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                            (...) h' f)
                         (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                            f (pr221 Lh')))
                      (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                         (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f))
                   (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                      (pr11 Lh') (pr2 p)))
                (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                   (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))) gg'
             (pr2 Lh'))
          (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell_subproof0
             B c y (h' · f) cc hy
             (pr11 Lh' · π,,
              ((((lassociator (...) h' f
                  • (pr121 Lh' ▹ f))
                 • rassociator (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f)
                • (pr11 Lh' ◃ pr1 p))
               • lassociator (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy)),,
              is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                         (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                            (...) h' f)
                         (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                            f (pr221 Lh')))
                      (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                         (pr11 Lh') (pr2 hx) f))
                   (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                      (pr11 Lh') (pr2 p)))
                (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                   (pr11 Lh') π (pr2 hy))) gg'
             (pr2 Lh'))) ^-1) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ℓ' π (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator ℓ (pr2 hx) f
  • (((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') ▹ f))
 • rassociator ℓ' (pr2 hx) f) • (ℓ' ◃ p)
 exact is_pb_to_cartesian_lift_2cell_cell_eq.
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
coherent_homot δ is_pb_to_cartesian_lift_2cell_cell

pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb

coherent_homot δ is_pb_to_cartesian_lift_2cell_cell

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
pr121 Lh
• (is_pb_to_cartesian_lift_2cell_cell ▹ pr2 hx) =
(pr2 cc ◃ δ) • pr121 Lh'

pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb

B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
pr121 Lh • ((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') =
(pr2 cc ◃ δ) • pr121 Lh'

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)

  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)

ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
((pr121 Lh • ℓhx ^-1) • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx' =
(pr2 cc ◃ δ) • pr121 Lh'

δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
isaprop
  (lift_2cell_factor_type (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
     σσ Lh Lh')

        
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
isProofIrrelevant
  (lift_2cell_factor_type (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
     σσ Lh Lh')

Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)

     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')

  (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : Lh ==>[ δ] Lh',
   transportf
     (λ z : h · f ==> h' · f,
      Lh ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] gg')
     (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))
     ((x0 ▹▹ (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) Lh') =
   disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B)
     (π,, p) Lh •• σσ)

     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
pr1 Lh · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> pr1 Lh' · pb_cone_pr2 pb
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
(((pr1 Lh ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator (pr1 Lh) (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (?β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator (pr1 Lh') (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator (pr1 Lh) (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (?α ▹ f))
 • rassociator (pr1 Lh') (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (pr1 Lh' ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
pr11 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = ?α

x, y: B

  (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
(((pr1 Lh ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator (pr1 Lh) (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (((ℓπ • pr1 σσ) • ℓπ' ^-1) ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator (pr1 Lh') (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator (pr1 Lh) (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
  • (((ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx') ▹ f))
 • rassociator (pr1 Lh') (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (pr1 Lh' ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
 apply is_pb_to_cartesian_lift_2cell_cell_eq.

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb

cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'

Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧

ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
pr11 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb =
(ℓhx ^-1 • (pr2 cc ◃ δ)) • ℓhx'

x, y: B

  (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
(is_invertible_2cell_inv ℓhx) ^-1
• (pr11 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb) = (pr2 cc ◃ δ) • ℓhx'

          exact (pr21 φ₁).

  (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
d:= ! transportf_cell_of_cod_over
    (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))

B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'
Lh: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg
Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
φ₁, φ₂: lift_2cell_factor_type (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
d:= ! transportf_cell_of_cod_over
    (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))
    ((pr1 φ₁ ▹▹ (π,, p))

pr1

• (is_invertible_2cell_inv ℓπ') ^-1 = ℓπ • pr1 σσ

          exact d.

     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
lift_2cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'

B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧

gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'

Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
lift_2cell_factor_type (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) σσ
  Lh Lh'
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
c: B
cc: cod_disp_bicat B c
h, h': B ⟦ c, x ⟧
gg: cc -->[ h · f] hy
gg': cc -->[ h' · f] hy
δ: h ==> h'
σσ: gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg'

Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx:= pr21 Lh: invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h) (ℓ · pr2 hx)
ℓπ:= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh)): invertible_2cell (ℓ · π) (pr1 gg)
ℓ':= pr11 Lh': B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧
ℓhx':= pr21 Lh': invertible_2cell (pr2 cc · h') (ℓ' · pr2 hx)
ℓπ':= pr1
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell B
     (pr2 Lh')): invertible_2cell (ℓ' · π) (pr1 gg')
Lh ==>[ δ] Lh'

(λ δδ : Lh ==>[ δ] Lh',
 transportf
   (λ z : h · f ==> h' · f, Lh ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] gg')
   (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))

Lh': lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg'
ℓ:= pr11 Lh: B ⟦ pr1 cc, pr1 hx ⟧

(λ δδ : Lh ==>[ δ] Lh',
 transportf
   (λ z : h · f ==> h' · f, Lh ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] gg')
   (id2_right (δ ▹ f) @ ! id2_left (δ ▹ f))

    •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B)

  is_pb_to_cartesian_lift_2cell_disp_cell
 abstract
              (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply cellset_property | ] ;
               etrans ; [ exact (transportf_cell_of_cod_over _ _) | ] ;
               simpl ;
               etrans ; [ apply maponpaths_2 ; apply (pb_ump_cell_pr2 pb_sqr) | ] ;
               do 2 refine (vassocl _ _ _ @ _) ;
               apply maponpaths ;
               refine (_ @ id2_right _) ;
               apply maponpaths ;
               apply (pr2 ℓπ')).
      Defined.
    End Lift2CellConeCell.

    
B: bicat
x, y: B

hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)

B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

 exact @is_pb_to_cartesian_lift_1cell.
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

pb_sqr: has_pb_ump pb
∏ (c : B) (cc : cod_disp_bicat B c)
(h h' : B ⟦ c, x ⟧) (gg : cc -->[ h · f] hy)
(gg' : cc -->[ h' · f] hy) (δ : h ==> h')
(σσ : gg ==>[ δ ▹ f] gg')
(Lh : lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) gg)
(Lh' : lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
         gg'),
lift_2cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) σσ Lh Lh'
 exact @is_pb_to_cartesian_lift_2cell.
    Defined.
  End PullbackToCartesian.

  Context (inv_B : locally_groupoid B).

  Section CartesianToPullback.
    Context {x y : B}
            {f : x --> y}
            {hx : cod_disp_bicat B x}
            {hy : cod_disp_bicat B y}
            (π : pr1 hx --> pr1 hy)
            (p : invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy))
            (Hp : cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)).

    Let pb := make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p.

    
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_ump_1 pb

    
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)

B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)

q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_1cell q pb

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
pb_1cell q pb

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
r:= lift_1cell_to_pb_1cell π p
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)) w: pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) · id₁ x)
     (pr1
        (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (pb_cone_pr1 q)
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
           (pb_cone_cell q)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q))) 
           (id₁ x) f)
        (pr2
           (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pb_cone_pr1 q)
                 (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
              (pb_cone_cell q)))))
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
pb_1cell q pb

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
r:= lift_1cell_to_pb_1cell π p
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)) w: pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) · id₁ x)
     (pr1
        (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (pb_cone_pr1 q)
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
           (pb_cone_cell q)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q))) 
           (id₁ x) f)
        (pr2
           (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pb_cone_pr1 q)
                 (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
              (pb_cone_cell q)))))
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)

q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
r:= lift_1cell_to_pb_1cell π p
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)) w: pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) · id₁ x)
     (pr1
        (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (pb_cone_pr1 q)
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
           (pb_cone_cell q)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q))) 
           (id₁ x) f)
        (pr2
           (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pb_cone_pr1 q)
                 (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
              (pb_cone_cell q)))))
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
invertible_2cell (?φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) (pb_cone_pr1 q)
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
r:= lift_1cell_to_pb_1cell π p
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)) w: pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) · id₁ x)
     (pr1
        (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (pb_cone_pr1 q)
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
           (pb_cone_cell q)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q))) 
           (id₁ x) f)
        (pr2
           (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pb_cone_pr1 q)
                 (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
              (pb_cone_cell q)))))
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
invertible_2cell (?φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pb_cone_pr2 q)
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
r:= lift_1cell_to_pb_1cell π p
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)) w: pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) · id₁ x)
     (pr1
        (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (pb_cone_pr1 q)
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
           (pb_cone_cell q)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q))) 
           (id₁ x) f)
        (pr2
           (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pb_cone_pr1 q)
                 (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
              (pb_cone_cell q)))))
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
?φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb =
(((lassociator ?φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (?τ ▹ f))
  • pb_cone_cell q) • (?θ ^-1 ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ?φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
r:= lift_1cell_to_pb_1cell π p
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)) w: pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) · id₁ x)
     (pr1
        (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (pb_cone_pr1 q)
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
           (pb_cone_cell q)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q))) 
           (id₁ x) f)
        (pr2
           (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pb_cone_pr1 q)
                 (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
              (pb_cone_cell q)))))
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
 exact r.
      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
r:= lift_1cell_to_pb_1cell π p
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)) w: pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) · id₁ x)
     (pr1
        (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (pb_cone_pr1 q)
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
           (pb_cone_cell q)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q))) 
           (id₁ x) f)
        (pr2
           (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pb_cone_pr1 q)
                 (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
              (pb_cone_cell q)))))
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr1 pb) (pb_cone_pr1 q)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (pb_1cell_pr1 r)
                  (runitor_invertible_2cell _)).
      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
r:= lift_1cell_to_pb_1cell π p
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)) w: pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) · id₁ x)
     (pr1
        (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (pb_cone_pr1 q)
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
           (pb_cone_cell q)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q))) 
           (id₁ x) f)
        (pr2
           (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pb_cone_pr1 q)
                 (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
              (pb_cone_cell q)))))
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
invertible_2cell (r · pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pb_cone_pr2 q)
 exact (pb_1cell_pr2 r).
      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
w:= pr1 Hp x (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) 
  (id₁ x)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)): lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p)
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q))
r:= lift_1cell_to_pb_1cell π p
  (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell 
        (pb_cone_pr1 q)
        (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
     (pb_cone_cell q)) w: pb_1cell
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))
     (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)) · id₁ x)
     (pr1
        (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (pb_cone_pr1 q)
              (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
           (pb_cone_cell q)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rassociator_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q))) 
           (id₁ x) f)
        (pr2
           (pb_cone_pr2 q,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 (pb_cone_pr1 q)
                 (lunitor_invertible_2cell f))
              (pb_cone_cell q)))))
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p)
r ◃ pb_cone_cell pb =
(((lassociator r (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
   • (comp_of_invertible_2cell (pb_1cell_pr1 r)
        (runitor_invertible_2cell
           (pr2 (make_ar (pb_cone_pr1 q)))) ▹ f))
  • pb_cone_cell q) • ((pb_1cell_pr2 r) ^-1 ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator r (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)
 abstract
          (refine (pb_1cell_eq r @ _) ; cbn ;
           rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           do 3 apply maponpaths_2 ;
           apply lunitor_lwhisker).
    Defined.

    Section PullbackUMP2.
      Context {q : B}
              {φ ψ : q --> pb}
              {α : φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb}
              {β : φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb}
              (r : (φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
                   • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)
                   • (β ▹ pr2 hy)
                   • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)
                   =
                   lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
                   • (α ▹ f)
                   • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
                   • (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)).

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
B ⟦ dom (make_ar φ), dom hy ⟧
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
invertible_2cell (pr2 (make_ar φ) · (pr2 hx · f))
  (?h · pr2 hy)

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
B ⟦ dom (make_ar φ), dom hy ⟧
 exact (φ · π).
        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
invertible_2cell (pr2 (make_ar φ) · (pr2 hx · f))
  (φ · π · pr2 hy)
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                   (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
                   (lassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)).
      Defined.

      Let φ_cone : pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
        := make_pb_cone
             q
             (φ · pr2 hx)
             (φ · π)
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
                (pr2 φ_disp)).

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_1cell φ_cone pb

Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π

     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ))

x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb

x, y: B

q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb

(((lassociator ?φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (?τ ▹ f))
  • pb_cone_cell φ_cone) • 
 (?θ ^-1 ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ?φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

 exact φ.

 apply id2_invertible_2cell.

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb =
(((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
   • (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone) ▹ f))
  • pb_cone_cell φ_cone)
 • ((id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone)) ^-1
    ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite !id2_rwhisker, !id2_right ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
             rewrite id2_right ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb

φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
B ⟦ dom (make_ar φ), dom hy ⟧
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
invertible_2cell (pr2 (make_ar φ) · (pr2 hx · f))
  (?h · pr2 hy)

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb

  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
B ⟦ dom (make_ar φ), dom hy ⟧
 exact (ψ · π).

B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π

  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
pr2 (make_ar φ) · (pr2 hx · f) ==> ψ · π · pr2 hy

                   • (α ▹ f)
                   • rassociator _ _ _
                   • (ψ ◃ p)
                   • lassociator _ _ _).
          
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
is_invertible_2cell
  ((((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
     • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f) • (ψ ◃ p))
   • lassociator ψ π (pr2 hy))

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb

  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))

 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

 apply inv_B.

 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp

f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧

((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
pr1 φ_disp ==> pr1 ψ_disp

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

coherent_homot (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) ?h

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb

  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π

  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)

           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
