 exact β.
        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
coherent_homot (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) β
 abstract
            (unfold coherent_homot ;
             cbn ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker, lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
             use vcomp_move_L_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ;
             exact r).
      Defined.

      Let ψ_cone : pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
        := make_pb_cone
             q
             (φ · pr2 hx)
             (ψ · π)
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ (pr2 hx) f)
                (pr2 ψ_disp)).

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_1cell ψ_cone pb

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f

                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x

                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π

  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
B ⟦ ψ_cone, pb ⟧
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
invertible_2cell (?φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
  (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb

  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy

  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
invertible_2cell (?φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb)
  (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone)
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
?φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb =
(((lassociator ?φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (?τ ▹ f))
  • pb_cone_cell ψ_cone) • 
 (?θ ^-1 ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ?φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb

  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy

  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f

                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π

σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
B ⟦ ψ_cone, pb ⟧
 exact ψ.

  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
invertible_2cell (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
  (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)

  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
is_invertible_2cell ?η

          
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
 exact α.

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                       (pr2

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

 apply inv_B.

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (pr2 (make_ar φ))

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)

                    f

                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))

                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))

                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))

  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
invertible_2cell (ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb)
  (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone)
 apply id2_invertible_2cell.
        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb

  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π

  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (pr2 (make_ar φ))

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb =
(((lassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
   • (inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (make_invertible_2cell
           (inv_B ψ_cone x (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
              (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)) ▹ f))
  • pb_cone_cell ψ_cone)
 • ((id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone)) ^-1
    ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy)
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_right ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
             rewrite id2_right ;
             do 3 (use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ]) ;
             cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

      Let φ_lift : lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) φ_disp
        := pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell.

      Let ψ_lift : lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) ψ_disp
        := pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell.

      Definition cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell
        : φ ==> ψ
        := pr1 (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell _ _ Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift).

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d:= pr2
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): (λ xx : pr1 φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] pr1 ψ_lift,
 let PPP :=
   (pr2 hx,, pr1 φ_lift) ==> (pr2 hx,, pr1 ψ_lift)
   in
 pr2 φ_lift ==>[
 id₂ (pr2 hx),, xx : PPP] 
 pr2 ψ_lift)
  (pr1
     (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
        (cod_disp_bicat B) 
        (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift))
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d:= pr2
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): id₂ (φ · pr2 hx)
• (pr1
     (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
        (cod_disp_bicat B) 
        (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ 
   pr2 hx) = (φ ◃ id₂ (pr2 hx)) • α
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d: pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ 
pr2 hx = α
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α

        exact d.
      Qed.

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)

  (φ · π)

     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ))

φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))

  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp

  (π,, p) ψ_disp
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
         (cod_disp_bicat B) 
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ 
       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
         (cod_disp_bicat B) 
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ 
       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
(pr1
   (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π) =
id₂ (φ · π) • β
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
         (cod_disp_bicat B) 
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ 
       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
d: (pr1
   (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell 
      (cod_disp_bicat B) 
      (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π)
• id₂ (ψ · π) = id₂ (φ · π) • β
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
         (cod_disp_bicat B) 
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ 
       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
(pr1
   (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π) =
id₂ (φ · π) • β

x, y: B

• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                    f

                       (pr2

                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))

        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π

σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B)

d':= maponpaths pr1

  (transportf

      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)

       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
(pr1
   (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π) =
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) ψ_lift))

          
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
         (cod_disp_bicat B) 
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ 
       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
(pr1
   (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π)

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

q: B

• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π

  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))

φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp

  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @

     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
         (cod_disp_bicat B) 
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ 
       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
   (λ x1 : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,

  (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @

  (pr1
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
(pr1
   (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f

                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x

                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))

  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)

  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)

     (cod_disp_bicat B)

transportf
  (λ _ : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f, φ · π ==> ψ · π)

  ((pr1

   • id₂ (ψ · π)) =

   (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π)

x, y: B

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)

  (φ · π)

        (pr2 (make_ar φ))

  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π

  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb

  (π,, p) φ_disp

  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
         (cod_disp_bicat B) 
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ 
       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
idfun (φ · π ==> ψ · π)
  ((pr1
      (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π)
   • id₂ (ψ · π)) =
(pr1
   (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
      (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π)

          apply idpath.
        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
         (cod_disp_bicat B) 
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ 
       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
d: (pr1
   (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell 
      (cod_disp_bicat B) 
      (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π)
• id₂ (ψ · π) = id₂ (φ · π) • β
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
d':= maponpaths pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell_commutes
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift): pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : pr2 hx · f ==> pr2 hx · f,
      φ_lift ;; (π,, p) ==>[ z] ψ_disp)
     (id2_right (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f) @
      ! id2_left (id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f))
     ((cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell
         (cod_disp_bicat B) 
         (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift ▹▹ 
       (π,, p))
      •• disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor
           (cod_disp_bicat B) 
           (π,, p) ψ_lift)) =
pr1
  (disp_cell_lift_1cell_factor 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) φ_lift •• σσ)
d: pr1
  (cartesian_1cell_lift_2cell 
     (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (π,, p) Hp σσ φ_lift ψ_lift) ▹ π = β
cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β

        exact d.
      Qed.

      Section Uniqueness.
        Context (τ₁ τ₂ : φ ==> ψ)
                (pr1τ₁ : τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α)
                (pr2τ₁ : τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β)
                (pr1τ₂ : τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α)
                (pr2τ₂ : τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β).

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B

α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy

  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift

        (pr2 (make_ar φ))
