  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f

                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))

                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))

  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell

β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
coherent_homot (id₂ (pr2 hx)) ?h

          
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1 φ_lift ==> pr1 ψ_lift
 exact τ₁.
          
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
coherent_homot (id₂ (pr2 hx)) τ₁
 abstract
              (unfold coherent_homot ;
               cbn ;
               rewrite lwhisker_id2, !id2_left ;
               exact pr1τ₁).
        Defined.

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift

                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))

  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb

  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f

                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))

              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator

  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))

  (π,, p) φ_disp

  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
pr1 φ_lift ==> pr1 ψ_lift
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
coherent_homot (id₂ (pr2 hx)) ?h

          
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
pr1 φ_lift ==> pr1 ψ_lift
 exact τ₂.
          
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
coherent_homot (id₂ (pr2 hx)) τ₂
 abstract
              (unfold coherent_homot ;
               cbn ;
               rewrite lwhisker_id2, !id2_left ;
               exact pr1τ₂).
        Defined.

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
lift_τ₂:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₂ lift_τ₂_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
τ₁ = τ₂

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
lift_τ₂:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₂ lift_τ₂_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
τ₁ = τ₂

          
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
lift_τ₂:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₂ lift_τ₂_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
(τ₁ ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π) = id₂ (φ · π) • β
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
lift_τ₂:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₂ lift_τ₂_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
(τ₂ ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π) = id₂ (φ · π) • β

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B

α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy

  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)

  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp

pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β

B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
φ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
φ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
lift_τ₂:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₂ lift_τ₂_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
τ₁ ▹ π = β

            exact pr2τ₁.
          
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)

pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B

α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb

  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))

((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell φ p)
     (lassociator_invertible_2cell φ π
        (pr2 hy))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy

  (φ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell
        (pr2 (make_ar φ)) 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 φ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
φ_cell:= make_pb_1cell φ
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr1 φ_cone))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 φ_cone))
  φ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell φ_cone pb
ψ_disp:= make_disp_1cell_cod (ψ · π)
  (make_invertible_2cell
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
lift_τ₂:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₂ lift_τ₂_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
(τ₂ ▹ π) • id₂ (ψ · π) = id₂ (φ · π) • β

  (comp_of_invertible_2cell

        (pr2 (make_ar φ))

  (make_invertible_2cell

           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    f
                    (inv_B
                       (pr2
                       (pb,, pr1 (make_ar φ)))
                       x 
                       (φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb)
                       (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ψ p))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator ψ π
           (pr2 hy)))): make_ar φ -->[ pr2 hx · f] hy
σσ:= make_disp_2cell_cod β σσ_subproof: φ_disp ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx) ▹ f] ψ_disp
ψ_cone:= make_pb_cone q (φ · pr2 hx) 
  (ψ · π)
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rassociator_invertible_2cell φ 
        (pr2 hx) f) (pr2 ψ_disp)): pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
ψ_cell:= make_pb_1cell ψ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (make_invertible_2cell
        (inv_B ψ_cone x 
           (pb_cone_pr1 ψ_cone)
           (ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb) α)))
  (id2_invertible_2cell (pb_cone_pr2 ψ_cone))
  ψ_cell_subproof: pb_1cell ψ_cone pb
φ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p φ_disp φ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) φ_disp
ψ_lift:= pb_1cell_to_lift_1cell π p ψ_disp ψ_cell: lift_1cell_factor (cod_disp_bicat B) 
  (π,, p) ψ_disp
τ₁, τ₂: φ ==> ψ
pr1τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₁: τ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
pr1τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α
pr2τ₂: τ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
lift_τ₁:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₁ lift_τ₁_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
lift_τ₂:= make_disp_2cell_cod τ₂ lift_τ₂_subproof: φ_lift ==>[ id₂ (pr2 hx)] ψ_lift
τ₂ ▹ π = β

            exact pr2τ₂.
        Qed.
      End Uniqueness.
    End PullbackUMP2.

    
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_ump_2 pb

inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y

p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
pb_ump_2 pb

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
∃! γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α × γ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   γ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α × γ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β)

B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
isaprop
  (∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
   γ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α × γ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β)
 abstract
          (use invproofirrelevance ;
           intros τ₁ τ₂ ;
           use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply cellset_property | ] ;
           exact (cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell_unique
                    r
                    _ _
                    (pr12 τ₁) (pr22 τ₁)
                    (pr12 τ₂) (pr22 τ₂))).
      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
π: B ⟦ pr1 hx, pr1 hy ⟧
p: invertible_2cell (pr2 hx · f) (π · pr2 hy)
Hp: cartesian_1cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (π,, p)
pb:= make_pb_cone (pr1 hx) (pr2 hx) π p: pb_cone f (pr2 hy)
q: B
φ, ψ: B ⟦ q, pb ⟧
α: φ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
β: φ · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> ψ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
r: (((φ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy))
 • (β ▹ pr2 hy))
• rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) (pr2 hy) =
((lassociator φ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (α ▹ f))
 • rassociator ψ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (ψ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
∑ γ : φ ==> ψ,
γ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α × γ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = β
 exact (cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell r
               ,,
               cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell_pr1 r
               ,,
               cartesian_1cell_pb_2cell_pr2 r).
    Defined.

has_pb_ump
  (make_pb_cone (pr1 (pb₁,, pb_cone_pr1 pb₁))
     (pr2 (pb₁,, pb_cone_pr1 pb₁)) (pr122 pb₁)
     (pr222 pb₁))

B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B

f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
hg: f ==> g
hx -->[ f] hy
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
hg: f ==> g
(λ ff : hx -->[ f] hy,
 ∑ αα : ff ==>[ hg] hf,
 is_cartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα) 
  ?pr1

B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
hg: f ==> g
(λ ff : hx -->[ f] hy,
 ∑ αα : ff ==>[ hg] hf,
 is_cartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα)
  (pr1 hf,,
   ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
         (inv_B x y f g hg)) (pr22 hf)
    :
    (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
           pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
     is_invertible_2cell η) ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf)))
 
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
hg: f ==> g
(pr1 hf,,
 ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
    (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
       (inv_B x y f g hg)) (pr22 hf)
  :
  (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
         pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
   is_invertible_2cell η) ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf))) ==>[
hg] hf
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
hg: f ==> g
(λ αα : (pr1 hf,,
         ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
               (pr2 hx) 
               (inv_B x y f g hg)) 
            (pr22 hf)
          :
          (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
                 pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
           is_invertible_2cell η)
            ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf))) ==>[ hg] hf,
 is_cartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα) 
  ?pr1

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
hg: f ==> g
(pr1 hf,,
 ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
    (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
       (inv_B x y f g hg)) (pr22 hf)
  :
  (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
         pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
   is_invertible_2cell η) ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf))) ==>[
hg] hf
 
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
hg: f ==> g
(λ xx : pr1
          (pr1 hf,,
           ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
                 (inv_B x y f g hg)) (pr22 hf)
            :
            (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
                   pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
             is_invertible_2cell η)
              ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf))) ==>[
        hg] pr1 hf,
 let PPP :=
   (f,,
    pr1
      (pr1 hf,,
       ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
          (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
             (inv_B x y f g hg)) (pr22 hf)
        :
        (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
               pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
         is_invertible_2cell η)
          ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf)))) ==>
   (g,, pr1 hf) in
 pr2
   (pr1 hf,,
    ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
       (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
          (inv_B x y f g hg)) (pr22 hf)
     :
     (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
            pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
      is_invertible_2cell η) ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf))) ==>[
 hg,, xx : PPP] pr2 hf)
  (id₂
     (pr1
        (pr1 hf,,
         ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
               (inv_B x y f g hg)) (pr22 hf)
          :
          (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
                 pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
           is_invertible_2cell η)
            ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf)))))

        abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
hg: f ==> g
(λ αα : (pr1 hf,,
         ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
               (inv_B x y f g hg)) (pr22 hf)
          :
          (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
                 pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
           is_invertible_2cell η)
            ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf))) ==>[ hg] hf,
 is_cartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα)
  (id₂
     (pr1
        (pr1 hf,,
         ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf),,
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
               (inv_B x y f g hg)) (pr22 hf)
          :
          (λ η : pr2 hx · pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
                 pr2 (f,, pr1 hf) · pr2 hy,
           is_invertible_2cell η)
            ((pr2 hx ◃ hg) • pr12 hf)))),,
   cod_local_cleaving_subproof x y hx hy f g hf hg)
 
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ g] hy
hg: f ==> g
is_cartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (id₂ (pr1 hf),,
   cod_local_cleaving_subproof x y hx hy f g hf hg)

B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: f ==> g
(λ gg : hx -->[ g] hy,
 ∑ αα : hf ==>[ hg] gg,
 is_opcartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα)
  (pr1 hf,,
   ((pr2 hx
     ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
        :
        is_invertible_2cell
          (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g)) ^-1)
    • pr12 hf),,
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv (inv_B x y f g hg)))
      (pr22 hf)
    :
    (λ η : pr2 hx · g ==> pr1 hf · pr2 hy,
     is_invertible_2cell η)
      ((pr2 hx
        ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
           :
           is_invertible_2cell
             (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g)) ^-1)
       • pr12 hf))
   :
   hx -->[ g] hy)
 
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: f ==> g
hf ==>[
hg] (pr1 hf,,
     ((pr2 hx
       ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
          :
          is_invertible_2cell
            (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g)) ^-1)
      • pr12 hf),,
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
           (is_invertible_2cell_inv (inv_B x y f g hg)))
        (pr22 hf)
      :
      (λ η : pr2 hx · g ==> pr1 hf · pr2 hy,
       is_invertible_2cell η)
        ((pr2 hx
          ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
             :

               (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g)) ^-1)
         • pr12 hf))
     :
     hx -->[ g] hy)
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: f ==> g
(λ αα : hf ==>[
        hg] (pr1 hf,,
             ((pr2 hx
               ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
                  :
                  is_invertible_2cell
                    (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g)) ^-1)
              • pr12 hf),,
             (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker 
                   (pr2 hx)
                   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                      (inv_B x y f g hg))) 
                (pr22 hf)
              :
              (λ η : pr2 hx · g ==> pr1 hf · pr2 hy,
               is_invertible_2cell η)
                ((pr2 hx
                  ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
                     :
                     is_invertible_2cell
                       (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g))
                    ^-1) • pr12 hf))
             :
             hx -->[ g] hy),
 is_opcartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα) 
  ?pr1

      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: f ==> g
hf ==>[
hg] (pr1 hf,,
     ((pr2 hx
       ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
          :
          is_invertible_2cell
            (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g)) ^-1)
      • pr12 hf),,
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
           (is_invertible_2cell_inv (inv_B x y f g hg)))
        (pr22 hf)
      :
      (λ η : pr2 hx · g ==> pr1 hf · pr2 hy,
       is_invertible_2cell η)
        ((pr2 hx
          ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
             :
             is_invertible_2cell
               (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g)) ^-1)
         • pr12 hf))
     :
     hx -->[ g] hy)
 
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: f ==> g
(λ xx : pr1 hf ==>[
        hg] pr1
              (pr1 hf,,
               ((pr2 hx
                 ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
                    :
                    is_invertible_2cell
                      (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g))
                   ^-1) • pr12 hf),,
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                     (pr2 hx)
                     (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                        (inv_B x y f g hg))) (pr22 hf)
                :
                (λ η : pr2 hx · g ==> pr1 hf · pr2 hy,
                 is_invertible_2cell η)
                  ((pr2 hx
                    ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
                       :
                       is_invertible_2cell
                         (hg : pr1 (f,, ...) ==> g))
                      ^-1) • pr12 hf))
               :
               hx -->[ g] hy),
 let PPP :=
   (f,, pr1 hf) ==>
   (g,,
    pr1
      (pr1 hf,,
       ((pr2 hx
         ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
            :
            is_invertible_2cell
              (hg : pr1 (f,, ...) ==> g)) ^-1)
        • pr12 hf),,
       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
          (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
             (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                (inv_B x y f g hg))) (pr22 hf)
        :
        (λ η : pr2 hx · g ==> pr1 hf · pr2 hy,
         is_invertible_2cell η)
          ((pr2 hx
            ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
               :
               is_invertible_2cell (hg : ... ==> g))
              ^-1) • pr12 hf))
       :
       hx -->[ g] hy)) in
 pr2 hf ==>[
 hg,, xx : PPP] pr2
                  (pr1 hf,,
                   ((pr2 hx
                     ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
                        :
                        is_invertible_2cell
                          (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g))
                       ^-1) • pr12 hf),,
                   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                      (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                         (pr2 hx)
                         (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                            (inv_B x y f g hg)))
                      (pr22 hf)
                    :
                    (λ η : pr2 hx · g ==>
                           pr1 hf · pr2 hy,
                     is_invertible_2cell η)
                      ((pr2 hx
                        ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
                           :
                           is_invertible_2cell
                             (hg : pr1 (f,, ...) ==> g))
                          ^-1) • pr12 hf))
                   :
                   hx -->[ g] hy)) (id₂ (pr1 hf))

        abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: f ==> g
(λ αα : hf ==>[
        hg] (pr1 hf,,
             ((pr2 hx
               ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
                  :
                  is_invertible_2cell
                    (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g)) ^-1)
              • pr12 hf),,
             (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (pr2 hx)
                   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
                      (inv_B x y f g hg))) (pr22 hf)
              :
              (λ η : pr2 hx · g ==> pr1 hf · pr2 hy,
               is_invertible_2cell η)
                ((pr2 hx
                  ◃ (inv_B x y f g hg
                     :
                     is_invertible_2cell
                       (hg : pr1 (f,, pr1 hf) ==> g))
                    ^-1) • pr12 hf))
             :
             hx -->[ g] hy),
 is_opcartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα)
  (id₂ (pr1 hf),,
   cod_local_opcleaving_subproof x y hx hy f g hf hg)
 
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: f ==> g
is_opcartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B)
  (id₂ (pr1 hf),,
   cod_local_opcleaving_subproof x y hx hy f g hf hg)

        
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
pb_B: has_pb B
x, y: B
hx: cod_disp_bicat B x
hy: cod_disp_bicat B y
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
hg: f ==> g
is_invertible_2cell (id₂ (pr1 hf))

        is_iso.
  Defined.

pb_B: has_pb B
lwhisker_cartesian (cod_disp_bicat B)

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
X: is_cartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) αα
is_cartesian_2cell (cod_disp_bicat B) (hh ◃◃ αα)
